workflows.name: arplot
workflows.description: Plots various performance data from the ALS archiver

workflows.name: loco
workflows.description: LOCO (Linear Optics from Closed Orbits) measurement & fitting

workflows.name: pbpm
workflows.description: [Paa, f, T1, LegendString] = pbpm_plotpsd(FileName, LineType, HoldFlag)

workflows.name: libera
workflows.description: Gets data from all the different ports for the Libera BPM

workflows.name: nsls
workflows.description: Plot the ADC spectrum after calcdata1 was run

workflows.name: getbpmarchive
workflows.description: Gets BPM data off the SSD archive on bpm01.als.lbl.gov

workflows.name: setpathals
workflows.description: Initializes the Matlab Middle Layer (MML) for ALS

workflows.name: matchramp
workflows.description: The following programs must be running:

workflows.name: getbpmlist
workflows.description: Return a BPM list based on key words and sector numbers

workflows.name: setrf
workflows.description: [RFam, VOLTS] = setrf_hw(Family, Field, RFnew, DeviceList, WaitFlag, RampFlag);

workflows.name: getcmlist
workflows.description: GETBPMLIST - Return a corrector magnet list based on key words and sector numbers

workflows.name: updateatindex
workflows.description: Updates the AT indices in the MiddleLayer with the present AT lattice (THERING)

workflows.name: igp
workflows.description: iGp_read          - Script to read out data and plot mean/RMS/spectrum

workflows.name: bend2gev
workflows.description: Compute the energy based on the ramp tables

workflows.name: id
workflows.description: function errorCode = printConsole(Object, ID no., isEPU?, isParallel?, gap no. or phase)

workflows.name: setmachineconfig
workflows.description: Sets the storage ring setpoints from a file or configuration data structure

workflows.name: magstep
workflows.description: MAGSTEP - Script for testing the time responce of a magnet

workflows.name: getbpmpsd
workflows.description: FA = getbpmpsd_fa(Family, DeviceList, NAVG, TriggerMode, FigNum)

workflows.name: getbpm
workflows.description: [x or y, tout, DataTime, ErrorFlag] = getbpm_bts(Family, DeviceList)

workflows.name: turnoffmps
workflows.description: Turn off all the storage ring magnet power supplies

workflows.name: turnonmps
workflows.description: Turn on all the GTB magnet power supplies

workflows.name: settv
workflows.description: Sets the video, paddle, and lamp

workflows.name: archiverchannels
workflows.description: Look for repeated names in the 3min archiver

workflows.name: gettv
workflows.description: [AM, tout, DataTime, ErrorFlag] = getx_booster(Family, Field, DeviceList, t, FreshDataFlag, TimeOutPeriod)
